content.text: The deploy workflow is failing on the lint-and-build step. Can you help me debug the CI pipeline?

I looked at the failing run. The lint step fails because eslint-plugin-obsidianmd flags a static style assignment. See the [CI run](https://github.com/example/agent-console/actions/runs/4815162342) and the [deployment guide](https://example.com/docs/deploy); the rule source is at https://example.com/eslint-rules.

content.newText:
# CI fix notes

- Root cause: static style assignment flagged by eslint-plugin-obsidianmd 0.3.0
- Fix: assign from a variable or use a CSS class
- Re-run the deploy workflow after the lint gate is green

content.text: I captured the root cause and the fix in [[CI fix notes]] so the team has it for next time.
